title: micranthemum arenarioides
intro: Micranthemum arenarioides, also known as Dwarf Pearlwort, is a small, creeping, and perennial plant species belonging to the family Montiaceae, native to the Americas. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Dwarf Pearlwort include its ability to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, and its potential to reduce swelling and pain in the body. Dwarf Pearlwort can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
